title: 10 best herbal essential oils for periodontal disease
description: English lavender essential oils helps with periodontal disease because of its potent antimicrobial properties, which combat the bacteria responsible for causing gum inflammation and infection. The oil's anti-inflammatory effects also help reduce swelling and pain associated with periodontal disease, promoting a healthy environment for the gums to heal.
